entries.title: cert-manager controller replica count stays single

predicate.expression: values.replicaCount is missing or less than 2

entries.impact: Certificate issuance and renewal lose HA during node disruption.

remediation.summary: Run at least two controller replicas for production clusters.
actions: Set replicaCount=2 or greater in production values.
Validate leader election and failover behavior in staging.

entries.title: cert-manager webhook replica count stays single

predicate.expression: values.webhook.replicaCount is missing or less than 2

entries.impact: Admission reliability degrades when webhook pod restarts or nodes drain.

remediation.summary: Run at least two webhook replicas for resilient admission flow.
actions: Set webhook.replicaCount=2 or greater.
Verify anti-affinity and disruption budgets for webhook pods.

entries.title: Rendered cert-manager controller deployment is single replica

predicate.expression: Deployment cert-manager has spec.replicas < 2

entries.impact: Controller downtime can block renewals and certificate issuance workflows.

remediation.summary: Render cert-manager deployment with at least two replicas.
actions: Increase deployment replicas for cert-manager controller.
Confirm leader election and queue processing continuity.

entries.title: Rendered cert-manager webhook container lacks resource requests/limits

predicate.expression: Deployment cert-manager-webhook container resources.requests or resources.limits missing

entries.impact: Admission path can become unstable under load or node pressure.

remediation.summary: Define CPU and memory requests/limits for webhook containers.
actions: Configure requests and limits for cert-manager-webhook.
Tune resource envelopes with admission latency SLO targets.

entries.title: cert-manager cainjector replica count stays single

predicate.expression: values.cainjector.replicaCount is missing or less than 2

entries.impact: CA bundle injection can become unavailable during node disruption.

remediation.summary: Run at least two cainjector replicas for resilient certificate updates.
actions: Set cainjector.replicaCount=2 or greater.
Validate failover while certificate resources continue reconciling.

entries.title: Rendered cert-manager webhook deployment is single replica

predicate.expression: Deployment cert-manager-webhook has spec.replicas < 2

entries.impact: Admission path resilience degrades during node drain or restart events.

remediation.summary: Render cert-manager webhook deployment with at least two replicas.
actions: Increase webhook replicas in chart values and re-render manifests.
Verify pod disruption behavior during maintenance windows.

entries.title: Rendered cert-manager cainjector deployment is single replica

predicate.expression: Deployment cert-manager-cainjector has spec.replicas < 2

entries.impact: CA bundle propagation resilience degrades during pod restarts or node drains.

remediation.summary: Render cert-manager cainjector with at least two replicas.
actions: Increase cainjector replicas in chart values and re-render manifests.
Verify CA injection continuity during maintenance windows.

entries.title: Rendered cert-manager cainjector container lacks resource requests/limits

predicate.expression: Deployment cert-manager-cainjector container resources.requests or resources.limits missing

entries.impact: CA injection throughput can degrade under load or node pressure.

remediation.summary: Define CPU and memory requests/limits for cainjector containers.
actions: Configure requests and limits for cert-manager-cainjector.
Tune resource envelopes with injection latency SLO targets.

entries.title: Prometheus retention configured without retention size cap

predicate.expression: prometheus.prometheusSpec.retention is set and retentionSize is empty

entries.impact: Disk usage can grow unpredictably and exhaust PV capacity.

remediation.summary: Set retention and retentionSize together.
actions: Configure both retention duration and retentionSize limits.
Alert on Prometheus storage utilization.

entries.title: Grafana admin credentials rely on default values

predicate.expression: grafana.adminPassword is default or unset while admin access is enabled

entries.impact: Dashboard and datasource control plane can be compromised.

remediation.summary: Source Grafana credentials from managed secrets.
actions: Set admin credentials from external secret.
Rotate credentials and disable anonymous admin access.

entries.title: Alertmanager HA replicas without persistent storage

predicate.expression: alertmanager.alertmanagerSpec.replicas > 1 and storage is not configured

entries.impact: Silences and notification state can be lost on restarts.

remediation.summary: Enable durable storage for Alertmanager state.
actions: Configure alertmanager storage volume claim template.
Back up silences during upgrades.

entries.title: kube-state-metrics resource requests or limits omitted

predicate.expression: kube-state-metrics resources requests/limits are missing

entries.impact: Scrape and metric freshness degrades under cluster churn.

remediation.summary: Allocate bounded resources for kube-state-metrics.
actions: Define CPU and memory requests/limits.
Tune scrape intervals to workload scale.

entries.title: ServiceMonitor namespace selectors are unconstrained

predicate.expression: ServiceMonitor namespaceSelector matches all namespaces without allowlist

entries.impact: Monitoring scope can exceed policy boundaries and increase noise.

remediation.summary: Constrain ServiceMonitor scope by namespace labels or explicit list.
actions: Set namespaceSelector to approved namespaces.
Require labels for opt-in monitoring.

entries.title: Admission webhooks enabled without TLS secret strategy

predicate.expression: prometheusOperator.admissionWebhooks.enabled is true and cert management path is undefined

entries.impact: Webhook startup or rotation failures can block reconciliations.

remediation.summary: Define cert-manager or self-signed certificate path explicitly.
actions: Configure webhook certificate source in chart values.
Validate certificate rotation in staging before release.

entries.title: Pod disruption budget blocks voluntary disruption

predicate.expression: minAvailable equals replicas for stateful monitoring components

entries.impact: Node drain and cluster upgrade workflows can stall.

remediation.summary: Use disruption budgets that allow one replica unavailable during maintenance.
actions: Set minAvailable lower than replicas or use maxUnavailable=1.
Verify eviction behavior in staging.

entries.title: ClusterRole grants broad wildcard permissions

predicate.expression: ClusterRole rules include wildcard verbs or resources without scoping constraints

entries.impact: Monitoring stack compromise can escalate cluster-wide access.

remediation.summary: Reduce RBAC grants to required APIs and verbs only.
actions: Review generated ClusterRole rules for wildcard entries.
Override chart RBAC with least-privilege custom role.

entries.title: Alertmanager and Prometheus run with single replicas

predicate.expression: alertmanager replicas = 1 or prometheus replicas = 1 in production profile

entries.impact: Monitoring plane becomes a single point of failure.

remediation.summary: Configure at least two replicas for control-plane observability components.
actions: Scale Prometheus and Alertmanager replicas for HA.
Validate anti-affinity and storage strategy.

entries.title: High-cardinality exporters enabled without budget controls

predicate.expression: expensive exporters enabled while scrape intervals and limits remain default

entries.impact: Metrics ingestion cost and storage growth can exceed budget unexpectedly.

remediation.summary: Tune scrape intervals and exporter selection against SLO and cost budgets.
actions: Disable unused exporters and collectors.
Increase scrape intervals for non-critical metrics.

entries.title: Wildcard IngressRoute without explicit TLSOption

predicate.expression: IngressRoute wildcard host is present and spec.tls.options.name is missing or unresolved

entries.impact: Wildcard routes can inherit weak or unexpected TLS behavior.

remediation.summary: Bind wildcard routes to an explicit hardened TLSOption.
actions: Create a TLSOption with minimum TLS version and cipher policy.
Reference the TLSOption from every wildcard IngressRoute.

entries.title: Dashboard/API route exposed without authentication middleware

predicate.expression: IngressRoute targets api@internal and does not include auth middleware

entries.impact: Operational endpoints can be exposed to untrusted clients.

remediation.summary: Require auth middleware on any dashboard or api@internal route.
actions: Add basic auth or OIDC middleware for dashboard endpoints.
Restrict dashboard route exposure to internal entrypoints.

entries.title: Access logging disabled in production profile

predicate.expression: values.logs.access.enabled is false for production deployment profile

entries.impact: Incident triage and forensic analysis are degraded.

remediation.summary: Enable access logs with bounded retention and redaction.
actions: Set logs.access.enabled=true in production values.
Configure log shipping and retention policy.

entries.title: Multiple replicas without anti-affinity

predicate.expression: values.deployment.replicas > 1 and pod anti-affinity is not configured

entries.impact: Node failure can remove all ingress capacity at once.

remediation.summary: Spread replicas across nodes using anti-affinity or topology spread constraints.
actions: Configure required or preferred anti-affinity for Traefik pods.
Add topology spread constraints for zone and node.

entries.title: Pod security context permits privilege escalation

predicate.expression: securityContext.allowPrivilegeEscalation is true or runAsNonRoot is false

entries.impact: Container escape impact and lateral movement risk increase materially.

remediation.summary: Enforce restricted pod security defaults.
actions: Set runAsNonRoot=true and allowPrivilegeEscalation=false.
Drop all Linux capabilities unless explicitly required.

entries.title: Requests/limits omitted for Traefik container

predicate.expression: values.resources.requests or values.resources.limits are missing

entries.impact: Autoscaling and scheduler fairness become unstable under load.

remediation.summary: Define CPU and memory requests/limits for gateway workloads.
actions: Configure resource requests for steady-state demand.
Set limits to prevent noisy-neighbor exhaustion.

entries.title: ACME resolver configured without persistent storage

predicate.expression: certificatesResolvers.acme is enabled while persistence.enabled is false

entries.impact: Certificate state can be lost across restarts causing issuance churn.

remediation.summary: Persist ACME storage for certificate lifecycle continuity.
actions: Enable persistence and durable volume for ACME storage.
Backup and restore ACME state during migration.

entries.title: Provider ingressClass left implicit

predicate.expression: providers.kubernetesIngress.ingressClass is empty

entries.impact: Route ownership can be ambiguous in multi-controller clusters.

remediation.summary: Set explicit ingress class ownership in chart values.
actions: Configure providers.kubernetesIngress.ingressClass explicitly.
Align ingressClassName on rendered Ingress resources.

entries.title: Service uses external exposure without source range restrictions

predicate.expression: Service type is LoadBalancer and spec.loadBalancerSourceRanges is empty

entries.impact: Gateway exposure surface is broader than intended.

remediation.summary: Restrict load balancer source CIDRs to trusted networks.
actions: Define loadBalancerSourceRanges for administrative entrypoints.
Apply network policy controls around ingress namespace.

entries.title: Deprecated API versions in rendered Traefik resources

predicate.expression: Rendered resources include deprecated apiVersion values for target Kubernetes minor

entries.impact: Cluster upgrades can fail or silently drop resources.

remediation.summary: Pin chart versions compatible with target Kubernetes API versions.
actions: Validate rendered manifests against target cluster API set.
Upgrade chart and CRDs before cluster minor upgrades.
